message:
fix(tests): use canonical sha256 trace hashes in staking_governance integration tests

The execution_trace_hash canonicalization check (e134011) caused 6 integration
tests to fail because they used plain strings like "trace-hash-001" instead of
canonical "sha256:<64-hex>" format. Added canonical_trace_hash() helper to
produce proper hashes from test labels.

12 integration tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
